{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220704314FD7BE6C8F5BE91C56E1"}"},"total":1331},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616756407058940734","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"正统修仙，没什么乱七八糟的境界，也不压战力，主角性格狠辣无情，也不是太监，该吃就吃，我觉得很不错，希望能写长篇，后续要么自己创建势力，要么就趴到宗门高层，单打独斗还是太累了，加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773415884,"group_id":"7591511434899508248","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"人生苦短，及时行乐，方能逍遥","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3CWI1sB5/U5jr9WBVRL9xk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b3ef53160a924ce196007ddc508508c7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709316&x-signature=44%2F4VTPo4ZpTNlYnpDvbTjavsPw%3D","user_id":"52335303290","user_name":"王生极乐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"52335303290","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7591511434899508248","book_info":{"abstract":"【杀伐果断】+【为达目的不择手段】+【无女主】+【中后期偏黑暗不喜勿入】
陈易穿越修仙界，一睁眼就在赌坊当打手。
五年前，他还是个任人欺辱的底层蝼蚁，被丁家丫鬟小莲当众羞辱，踩在脚下。
五年后，他已是洛城最大赌坊的老板，心狠手辣，算计无双。
“欠债还钱，天经地义。”
陈易设局让丁家少爷欠下巨债，笑眯眯地逼他用丫鬟小莲抵债。
当小莲跪在他面前颤抖时，陈易只是淡淡一笑：
“五年前你踩我的时候，可想过今天？”
直到那天，他得到一枚神秘的青云令。
陈易盯着令牌，眼里的火彻底烧起来了。
去他的仁义道德，去他的脸面名声！
这仙，老子修定了！
他孤身踏入深山，历经恶狼、深山迷途，在破庙中与孤寂为伴。
仙路争锋，手段不分黑白，只看谁活到最后......
陈易攥紧了拳头，咧嘴露出森然笑意：
“诸位道友，请小心了。我这人为了修仙……可是什么都做得出来的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6ce05ac58f7bf1eefbae5f01172a08ff","author":"喜欢军鼓的海刺龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7591511434899508248","book_name":"不择手段，可成仙否？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"36.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7591515903217369624","read_count":"362684","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"562459"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"273","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,穿越,奇幻仙侠,无女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e6f742c839f3c2e4317530a91cf988f9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318271&x-signature=gZEpmdKhFGnZ3%2F3iaKLT04TDK%2BQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1283841344930040","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"279"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220704314FD7BE6C8F5BE91C56E1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forw
